data.body: AC amendment (gap-3): GIT_* unset must execute INSIDE ticket_show body (or inside _ticketlib_dispatch subshell), never at library source scope. Porting 'unset GIT_DIR GIT_INDEX_FILE...' to library top level would violate the no-mutation contract. Document this in a comment at library top. Also: bridge alert stderr warning logic from ticket-show.sh must be preserved inside ticket_show function.
